title: Living Nature British Grey Shorthair Kitten, Realistic Soft Cuddly Cat Toy, Naturli Eco-Friendly Plush, 17cm
features: BEAUTIFUL BRITISH BLUE: The stunning silver British Shorthair kitten soft toy from Living Nature is a gorgeous replica of the real cat, complete with striking eyes and a sweet, friendly face. Take home this adorable kitten toy and enjoy cosy cuddles with your new furry companion.

CUDDLY FELINE FRIEND: British Blues are famous for their handsome appearance and unique silver colouring - it’s no surprise this breed is one of the most popular! Our realistic kitten cuddly toy is made for stroking and snuggling and is the pawfect pet plush for cat lovers everywhere.

ACCURATE BY DESIGN: Our cat soft toys are beautifully made with highly accurate detailing from the fur, eyes, and features. Preened to perfection, your Grey Shorthair Kitten has smooth grey fur, big blue eyes and adorable features. Our artists add shading and texture by hand for a realistic finish down to the very last detail.

EDUCATIONAL FACT TAGS: Our British Shorthair Kitten cuddly toy comes with an educational tag so you can learn all about your favourite pup – from their behaviour, diet and even how to take care of them! Young or mature, Living Nature’s beautiful British Shorthair Kitten plush is the perfect companion for animal lovers worldwide.

NATURLI ECO-FRIENDLY TOYS: Finding eco-friendly toys for kids can be tricky, but we’re committed to doing things sustainably here at Living Nature. Our lovely British Shorthair Kitten is made using Naturli recycled post-consumer PET plastic from bottles and containers that would otherwise end up in landfill.
description: From the brand Previous page Living Nature animals are more than just soft toys; they are forever friends for animal lovers aged 0 to 100. With over 120 different animals to choose from, pick your favourites and collect the whole gang to create your very own home zoo! There’s a plush pet for everyone.
